evals.prompt: A PR needed three checker cycles and one reviewer rejection before merge. Run a process retrospective.
evals.expected_output: Analyzes STATUS.md, PR/checker/reviewer evidence, identifies repeated process failures, records durable lessons, and proposes bounded follow-up tasks without editing code.
assertions: Uses evidence from status, CI, reviews, handoffs, and commits.
Distinguishes builder, checker, spec, reviewer, and coordinator misses.
Avoids full log dumps and extracts only durable lessons.
Does not weaken gates or implement fixes while in retrospective role.
